pi_items.source: task.json description (line 5) specifies Product Name 'Home Gym Starter Kit'
Adobe Commerce documentation confirms 'grouped' is a valid Magento product type consisting of simple standalone products presented as a group, ideal for kits
setup_magento.sh line 262 creates 'Sports' category. Child products YOGA-001 and BOTTLE-001 are also assigned to Sports category (lines 289-290)
setup_magento.sh line 289 pre-creates product with SKU 'YOGA-001' ('Yoga Mat Premium') in Sports category
setup_magento.sh line 290 pre-creates product with SKU 'BOTTLE-001' ('Insulated Water Bottle') in Sports category
setup_magento.sh line 284 pre-creates product with SKU 'TSHIRT-001' ('Classic Cotton T-Shirt') in Clothing category

privileged_info_summary: The grouped_product_kit task asks an agent to create a Magento grouped product named 'Home Gym Starter Kit' with SKU 'HOMEGYM-KIT-001' in the 'Sports' category. It must link three pre-existing child products: YOGA-001 (Yoga Mat Premium, qty 1), BOTTLE-001 (Insulated Water Bottle, qty 2), and TSHIRT-001 (Classic Cotton T-Shirt, qty 1). All three child products and the Sports category are pre-created in the test environment via setup_magento.sh. Grouped products in Magento are composite product types consisting of simple standalone products presented together, suitable for bundles and kits.
